subject: Re: step back in M
body:
Hi Grigory,
You will find a number of files in “versions” folders, at a minimum you should place files from the version of both your tilt series xml files and M files that you want.
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Sep 30, 2025, at 08:39, Grigory Tagiltsev <grigory.tagiltsev@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿Hi everyone,
Is there a way to go back a step in M and continue from there? So if M overfits the job, I don't have to rerun the entire project from scratch.
Thank you,
Grigory
